package.name: lidar_odometry
package.description: Launch-only package: ICP (scan-matching) odometry from the YDLidar's /scan, using RTAB-Map's icp_odometry node. Publishes /odom and the odom-to-base_link TF, estimating motion purely from consecutive LIDAR scans. Built because the chassis crack makes wheel-encoder odometry (wheel_odometry package) untrustworthy (see CLAUDE.md), so a LIDAR-only motion estimate is needed. This is a lighter alternative to running full cartographer_slam when all you want is odometry, not a map.
